response.justification: Candidate is a senior/staff-level engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for an entry-level junior/mid role. While technical skills (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS) align well, the seniority mismatch is severe — likely overqualified, expensive, and a flight risk. Location is Berlin which fits the on-site requirement, but PostgreSQL and Nest.js experience are not evident (MongoDB is the primary DB background). Better suited for senior roles.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js and React fullstack experience across multiple production platforms
Berlin-based, satisfying high on-site presence requirement
Exposure to AI/LLM agent infrastructure aligns with nice-to-have qualifications
concerns: Massive seniority mismatch — Staff/Senior engineer applying for entry-level position
No demonstrated PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience; DB background is MongoDB
High retention risk and likely salary expectations far exceed junior-role budget
